hibernate-mapping.sql-query: SELECT PLA.ID_PLAN AS "idPlan", PLA.ORDEN_COLUMNA AS "ordenColumna", "plan", PLA.ESTADO AS "estado" FROM SGALERTASSYS.ALERTA_PLAN PLA with (nolock) WHERE PLA.ID_ALERTA = :id_alerta ORDER BY PLA.ORDEN_COLUMNA ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM SGALERTASSYS.ALERTA_PLAN PLA with (nolock) WHERE PLA.ID_ALERTA = :id_alerta

SELECT DES.ID_DESTINO AS "idDestino", DES.CORREO_DESTINO AS "correoDestino", DES.ID_TIPO_DESTINO AS "idTipoDestino", DES.NOMBRE_PERSONA AS "nombrePersona", DES.ID_PERSONA AS "idPersona", DES.ESTADO AS "estado" FROM SGALERTASSYS.ALERTA_DESTINO DES with (nolock) WHERE DES.ID_ALERTA = :id_alerta ORDER BY DES.ID_DESTINO ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM SGALERTASSYS.ALERTA_DESTINO DES with (nolock) WHERE DES.ID_ALERTA = :id_alerta

SELECT ADI.ID_ADICIONAL AS "nroRegistro", ADI.NOMBRE_CAMPO AS "nombreCampo", ADI.VALOR AS "valor", ADI.ORDEN_COLUMNA AS "ordenColumna", ADI.ESTADO AS "estado", ADI.ID_LOG_ALERTA AS "idLogAlerta", ADI.DESCRIPCION_CAMPO AS "descripcionCampo" FROM SGALERTASSYS.ALERTA_ADICIONAL ADI with (nolock) WHERE ADI.ID_ALERTA = :id_alerta ORDER BY ADI.ID_ADICIONAL ASC
SELECT count(*) FROM SGALERTASSYS.ALERTA_ADICIONAL ADI with (nolock) WHERE ADI.ID_ALERTA = :id_alerta

SELECT AD.NRO_REGISTRO AS "nroRegistro", AD.NOMBRE_CAMPO AS "nombreCampo", AD.VALOR AS "valor", AD.ORDEN_COLUMNA AS "ordenColumna", AD.ESTADO AS "estado", AD.ID_LOG_ALERTA AS "idLogAlerta", AD.ID_ALINEACION_COLUMNA AS "idAlineacionColumna" FROM SGALERTASSYS.ALERTA_DETALLE AD with (nolock) WHERE AD.ID_ALERTA = :id_alerta ORDER BY AD.ID_LOG_ALERTA, AD.NRO_REGISTRO, AD.ORDEN_COLUMNA
SELECT count(*) FROM SGALERTASSYS.ALERTA_DETALLE AD with (nolock) WHERE AD.ID_ALERTA = :id_alerta

select FA.ID_ALERTA AS "idAlerta", FA.RESUMEN_LOG_ALERTA AS "resumenLogAlerta", RN.NOMBRE AS "nombre", FA.CREACION_FECHA as "creacionFecha", FA.FLG_CORREO_GENERADO AS "flgCorreoGenerado", (SELECT count(*) "TOTAL" FROM SGALERTASSYS.ALERTA_DETALLE FAD with (nolock) WHERE FAD.ID_ALERTA = FA.ID_ALERTA ) as "cantidadRegistros" FROM SGALERTASSYS.ALERTA FA with (nolock) , SGALERTASSYS.REGLA_NEGOCIO RN with (nolock) where FA.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO = RN.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO AND FA.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO = ISNULL(:idreglanegocio,FA.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO) AND cast(FA.CREACION_FECHA as date) BETWEEN cast(:fechaPreparacionInicio as date) AND cast(:fechaPreparacionFin as date) AND UPPER(FA.RESUMEN_LOG_ALERTA) Like '%' + ISNULL(UPPER(:p_resumenlogalerta) , UPPER(FA.RESUMEN_LOG_ALERTA)) + '%' order by FA.ID_ALERTA desc

select count(1) FROM SGALERTASSYS.ALERTA FA with (nolock), SGALERTASSYS.REGLA_NEGOCIO RN with (nolock) where FA.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO = RN.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO AND FA.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO = ISNULL(:idreglanegocio,FA.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO) AND cast(FA.CREACION_FECHA as date) BETWEEN cast(:fechaPreparacionInicio as date) AND cast(:fechaPreparacionFin as date) AND ISNULL(FA.RESUMEN_LOG_ALERTA,'') = ISNULL(:p_resumenlogalerta,ISNULL(FA.RESUMEN_LOG_ALERTA,''))

UPDATE SGALERTASSYS.CONFIGURACION_SERVICIO SET FLG_EJECUTANDO_EVALUAR_REGLA = :p_estado, SI_EJECUTANDO_EVALUAR_REGLA = (SELECT CASE :p_estado WHEN 'S' THEN GETDATE() ELSE SI_EJECUTANDO_EVALUAR_REGLA END ), NO_EJECUTANDO_EVALUAR_REGLA = (SELECT CASE :p_estado WHEN 'N' THEN GETDATE() ELSE NULL END ) WHERE ID_CONFIGURACION_SERVICIO = 1

UPDATE SGALERTASSYS.CONFIGURACION_SERVICIO SET FLG_EJECUTANDO_EXTRAER_DATA = :p_estado, SI_EJECUTANDO_EXTRAER_DATA = (SELECT CASE :p_estado WHEN 'S' THEN GETDATE() ELSE SI_EJECUTANDO_EXTRAER_DATA END ), NO_EJECUTANDO_EXTRAER_DATA = (SELECT CASE :p_estado WHEN 'N' THEN GETDATE() ELSE NULL END ) WHERE ID_CONFIGURACION_SERVICIO = 1

UPDATE SGALERTASSYS.CONFIGURACION_SERVICIO SET FLG_EJECUTANDO_CREAR_ALERTA = :p_estado, SI_EJECUTANDO_CREAR_ALERTA = (SELECT CASE :p_estado WHEN 'S' THEN GETDATE() ELSE SI_EJECUTANDO_CREAR_ALERTA END ), NO_EJECUTANDO_CREAR_ALERTA = (SELECT CASE :p_estado WHEN 'N' THEN GETDATE() ELSE NULL END ) WHERE ID_CONFIGURACION_SERVICIO = 1

UPDATE SGALERTASSYS.CONFIGURACION_SERVICIO SET FLG_EJECUTANDO_CREAR_CORREO = :p_estado, SI_EJECUTANDO_CREAR_CORREO = (SELECT CASE :p_estado WHEN 'S' THEN GETDATE() ELSE SI_EJECUTANDO_CREAR_CORREO END ), NO_EJECUTANDO_CREAR_CORREO = (SELECT CASE :p_estado WHEN 'N' THEN GETDATE() ELSE NULL END ) WHERE ID_CONFIGURACION_SERVICIO = 1

UPDATE SGALERTASSYS.CONFIGURACION_SERVICIO SET FLG_EJECUTANDO_ENVIO_CORREO = :p_estado, SI_EJECUTANDO_ENVIO_CORREO = (SELECT CASE :p_estado WHEN 'S' THEN GETDATE() ELSE SI_EJECUTANDO_ENVIO_CORREO END ), NO_EJECUTANDO_ENVIO_CORREO = (SELECT CASE :p_estado WHEN 'N' THEN GETDATE() ELSE NULL END ) WHERE ID_CONFIGURACION_SERVICIO = 1
